reviews.review_title: 5 stars game if no too much bugs
reviews.review_description:
Game and concept is fun. Please fix I want to play. 
Bugs 
1. Drop anything on floor, it sink in the floor can’t get it back including knife 
2. When you chop mushroom or cheese, some pieces it sink in the cutting board. 
3. The whole counters sometimes keep going up and down while playing
4. Can’t push the button to arrange in the truck. Push “Burger” button and it won’t go to storage menu. Push exit button it don’t do anything. 
5. From the watch, if once in a while luckily can go into burger button, can’t place the stove or counter or fryer that bought from the shop.

The game is really good and theres nothing really to say.its bad.othere then the bugs with the knife in the floor. But i do wish that they add a mode wheres theres no time limit so you can just do orders
Really fun

Okay so I love this game but I got three complaints one whenever I'm walking I just get stuck too whenever I make the burger with two mushrooms it just doesn't complete three I want more prep time and more work time that's all great game though

The only reason this game isn’t a 5 star is because of the fact that there is no multiplayer. I love this game but I could see how other people got bored I’m sure the devs have thought “oh if we add it we’ll be just like all the games we’re competing with?!?” Welp I hate to break it to you…. Yall are missing the whole point look this game is perfect and I mean PERFECT for coop I don’t think it needs 4 player multiplayer but if you could pull it off hammer yea, I think the way to do that is let everyone have their own food trucks and the maps are different events to hang out in like music festivals,local busines events and more, yes you should be able to exit your food trucks and interact with one another but only for the multiplayer online servers, there should be cooperative servers, 2v2 servers and online hangout servers, I honestly think this isn’t a bad idea at all I mean this game has major potential like if you were also able to fully customize your food truck like the outside of it and all I believe this right here is a “holy grail” game. Ps love ya devs… plus I know it will take time

I think this game is a amazing game to kill time with. I got this game when it was free, and I’m glad I did. But it not quite perfect, it still has some bugs like, sometimes when I enter the supermarket my player gets stuck in the floor. But still I look forward to seeing the new updates. Multiplayer would be nice. And can you guys PLEASE let us move the cups and trays because it’s really inconvenient to have to run through my whole van just to grab a cup or a fry and burger tray.

That’s it. I hope this review finds you well

reviews.review_title: Hate it and didn’t even play it
reviews.review_description: I accidentally purchased this and it wouldn’t let me refund so I looked at a video of it to see if it worth and look horrible my friend said he bought and said he refunded so fast

Worked for awhile.  Even purchased more in game content and now it won't load past the purple screen.  It just shows the game logo and won't go past this point.  I've tried EVERYTHING including completely resetting the quest, redownloading.  Very frustrating and seems like others are having the same issue.  Please fix this!

developer_response.body: We have found that clearing your app data fixes the issue. Search "storage" on your device and look for the the title. From there you can clear the app data and the game should work.

reviews.review_description: I got the game yesterday and i liked it a lot but i made a lot of progress and now it won't load up past the title screen and i spent 9$ on this game hoping it would be worth it but i guess not and i cant even return it anymore so i just have a game that i cant play and yes ive restarted my head set yes ive cleared my app data as they said go do and yet nothing i wish for these issues to get better bc i truly enjoy this game but i don't like to dee my money being wasted so please grill on wheels devs fix these issues
Very fun
Goodd
i think it is a good game but not worth 8 dollars

I really like this game and enjoyed the free trial so much that I decided to buy the full version. The gameplay is fun and creative — I was excited to unlock more tools like the fryer and keep progressing.

But after upgrading, the game still shows “11 days” and “0 customers served.” It won’t track my progress, and I can’t unlock new areas or use the fryer I purchased. I’ve tried clearing app data, uninstalling, and reinstalling, but nothing fixes it.

Meta Support confirmed I own the full Quest version and told me to contact the developer — but I can’t find a way to reach Limina directly.

I’d love to keep playing this game and supporting it. Please help fix this issue or reset my save so I can enjoy the full version properly

developer_response.body: One thing to try would be clearing your app data. It will reset your progress but should fix the issue you are facing. Search "storage" in the search bar and go to your storage in settings. From there find the app and clear the app data. Hope this helps. You can reach out to support@clique.games or join the discord and we can help resolve the issue if it still exists.

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun I really like the Burger and Dubai chocolate and the customization and upgrades and I really like the strategy gameplay and I really like the dynamic environments and the progression and rewards that you can earn by playing the game and the Culinary gameplay cus you can craft different burgers pizzas and resource management and the Atmospheric setting it’s a city that looks like a city this game is really addictive most definitely would recommend 10/10

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review, glad to hear you are enjoying the experience!

reviews.review_title: Great game with lots of potential!
reviews.review_description: I love cooking games and this one really keeps me busy. Does have a few bugs and couple of things that could be worked on but other than that its a fun and solid game. I do feel like it needs coop to really bring it to another level but overall fun game. Hopefully the devs continue to work on it and drop updates but from the looks of it i dont think so unfortunately.

developer_response.body: We have an update coming this month! It does not include co-op but we are still working on the game!

This game is perfect I already have the pressure palate wagon (the plaza) and I have the deep fryer also the Dubai chocolate and Pizza dlc the only thing I think could be improved are the price rates in the shop (1000 bucks for ketchup, mustard and the green sauce) and the prep time limit, have to get 4 things ready in like 2 mins (burgers, drinks, pizza and chocolate)
Can the game pls increase the time limit

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying the game! Thank you for the feedback, we will consider some of the changes in future updates.
